title: Willingness toward COVID-19 vaccination, coadministration with other vaccines and receive a COVID-19 vaccine booster: a cross-sectional study on the guardians of children in China.
ehr_evidence: The study used a self-administered questionnaire distributed through the 'Xiao Dou Miao' app.
summary: A cross-sectional study investigating the willingness of guardians in China to vaccinate children against COVID-19, including coadministration and booster doses.
key_findings: 86.68% of guardians were willing to vaccinate their children with the COVID-19 vaccine.
77% were willing toward coadministration of COVID-19 and influenza vaccines.
82% were willing to vaccinate their children with a COVID-19 vaccine booster.
data_availability_statement: Supplementary data for this article can be accessed on the publisher’s website at https://doi.org/10.1080/21645515.2022.2049169.
